description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On May 10, 2025 at 4:18 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a collision 
involving a passenger car on S. Van Ness Avenue at 21st Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was stopped facing south on S. Van Ness Avenue in the rightmost lane for a red light at the intersection of 21st Street. 
While the Waymo AV remained stopped for the red light, a passenger car approached the Waymo AV from behind and the front of the 
passenger car made contact with the rear of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was 
engaged in autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage. 
 
Waymo is reporting this crash under Request No. 1 of Standing General Order 2021-01 because a vehicle involved was towed away. 
Waymo may supplement or correct its reporting with additional information as it may become available. 
Print
Clear Form
